name: ifttt
description: IFTTT — trigger webhooks and applets. Create IFTTT Webhooks applets at ifttt.com/maker_webhooks, then trigger them from Nova. Set IFTTT_KEY to your Webhooks key.

endpoints.name: trigger
endpoints.description: Trigger an IFTTT Webhook event. Pass up to 3 values as ingredients. Example: event=lights_on, key=your_ifttt_key

endpoints.name: trigger_json
endpoints.description: Trigger with JSON body for richer data. The body is passed as-is to the applet.
